title: INFINITY DISK
author: dopple
excerpt: A New way of listening to music. You Just upload your mp3 archives and the system uploads them to the framework for everyone to listen to, a platform that puts the artist allways first.

title: ROOTS
author: dopple
excerpt: E-commerce and lookbook for Roots — a Buenos Aires clothing brand. Clean editorial layout, full-screen lookbook, product filtering and contact integration.
